ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

BRANDON SCHANTZ, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs LOUIS H. YIM and THREE WISE PEOPLE, LLC.,
No appearance by defaulted defendants TJOMAN BUDITASLIM and LING S. BUDITASLIM,
Witness, Louis H. Yim, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiffs.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Check from TJ & Scott Management to Louis Yim dated 11/21/2014
2-Copy of check from TJ & Scott Management to Louis Yim dated 11/21/2014
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
First Cause of Action:
Damages: $50,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,254.79
Attorney's Fees: $27,639.17

Second Cause of Action (Fraud):
Damages: $50,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,254.79

Third Cause of Action (Penal code 496(A)):
Damages: $150,000.00 (Treble)
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,254.79
Attorney's Fees: $27,639.17

Fourth Cause of Action (Civil Code 1719)
Damages: $20,000.00
Statutory Damages of 1500.00

Costs: $1297.78
Total Judgment in the amount of $188,691.74
No double recovery allowed.

Counsel to submit Judgment for Court's signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
